description: A site manager must coordinate a critical lift of a large HVAC unit onto the roof, which requires temporarily closing a section of the site.

nodes.task_description: Create a lift plan, specifying the crane position, load weight, and exclusion zone.

expected_outcome.expected: A formal lift plan document is created.

nodes.task_description: Notify all site personnel of the time and area of the upcoming crane lift and exclusion zone.

expected_outcome.expected: A site-wide safety notification is sent out.
